Payments An online payments platform engineered for growth. Start now Increase customer acquisition with 100+ payment methods. Improve conversion with Link - Stripe’s accelerated checkout. Reduce fraud and increase revenue with ML optimisations. Save engineering time with pre-built UIs. Credit and debit cards Accept widely used credit and debit cards and prepaid cards for online payments. 3.4% + $0.50 per successful transaction for domestic cards 3.4% + US$0.50 per successful card charge when settled in USD + 0.5% for international cards* + 2% if currency conversion is required Bank-based and other payment methods Offer bank debits, bank transfers, and other locally relevant payment methods. 1.3% per successful PayNow transfer. See more payment methods Digital wallets Offer your customers a quick and convenient way to pay with digital wallets 2.2% + $0.35 Alipay Cards pricing applies to Apple Pay and Google Pay. 2.2% + $0.35 WeChat Pay Cards pricing applies to Apple Pay and Google Pay. 3.3% GrabPay Cards pricing applies to Apple Pay and Google Pay. Payment optimisations Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing More features Payment Links No-code links to sell online without a website. Start now Accept payments in minutes by generating no-code links. Sell products, offer subscriptions, and more. Create at scale via our API to automate marketing campaigns and sales operations. Accept payments Accept payments made using a payment link. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Custom domain Use your own domain while hosting your payments page or customer portal on Stripe. US$10.00 per month Learn more Post-payment invoices Automatically generate an invoice after a one-off purchase. 0.4% on transaction total US$2.00 cap per invoice Learn more Checkout Pre-built payment form optimised for conversion. Start now Save engineering time and get started quickly. Reduce friction with features designed to improve conversion. Customise with your branding. Accept payments Accept payments made on Stripe Checkout. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing Custom domain Use your own domain while hosting your payments page or customer portal on Stripe. US$10.00 per month Learn more Post-payment invoices Automatically generate an invoice after a one-off purchase. 0.4% on transaction total US$2.00 cap per invoice Learn more Managed Payments Stripe's merchant of record solution that simplifies global selling. Start now Quickly launch or expand your businesses worldwide with no additional setup. Offload tax compliance, fraud, disputes, and customer support responsibilities. Use Managed Payments for all your transactions or just for specific markets and products. Merchant of record services A complete merchant of record solution for global digital commerce. Includes indirect tax compliance (sales tax, VAT, GST) and remittance in more than 75 countries, along with fraud prevention, dispute management, invoicing, and customer support globally. 3.5% per successful Managed Payments transaction in addition to Payments fees Learn more Terminal Tools to accept in-person payments and unify commerce. Start now Build a custom checkout or integrate with hundreds of third-party POS systems. Streamline hardware logistics with pre-certified Stripe or select 3P card readers. Unify online and in-person payments to create a cohesive customer experience. Scale globally with one integration. Cards and wallets Accept widely used credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets for in-person payments. 3.4% + $0.50 per successful charge for domestic cards + 0.5% for international cards + $0.15 per authorisation for Tap to Pay Accept contactless payments without additional hardware using compatible iPhone or Android devices. + $0.07 per authorisation for optional point-to-point-encryption Access PCI-certified point-to-point-encryption (P2PE) required in certain industries. All Terminal transactions are end-to-end encrypted by default. Card readers Use pre-certified card readers with cloud-based fleet management that streamlines device logistics and management at scale. $89.00 BBPOS WisePad 3 Excl. VAT $389.00 Stripe Reader S710 Excl. VAT $389.00 Stripe Reader S700 Excl. VAT Mobile Unlimited cellular data usage on enabled readers. Apps on Device data usage limited to 10 GB per reader per month. $13.00 per reader per month See pricing details Radar Advanced fraud detection and prevention tools. Start now Reduce fraud with ML powered by the Stripe network. Customise fraud prevention by creating custom rules. Get rich fraud insights for more efficient and accurate manual reviews. Radar’s machine learning Fraud protection powered by billions of data points across the Stripe network. Included For accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing $0.08 per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method Radar for Fraud Teams Advanced fraud protection tools allowing for greater control and customisable settings. Includes Radar’s machine learning. Support for Radar risk scores for non-Stripe transactions is available. Contact sales to learn more. Try for free for 30 days $0.02 per screened transaction for accounts with all payment methods on standard pricing $0.10 per screened transaction for accounts with custom pricing for any payment method Dispute prevention Help reduce dispute rates with dispute prevention tools powered by Verifi from Visa and Ethoca from Mastercard. Request access. Included Dispute deflection lookups $15.00 per Visa resolution $15.00 per Visa Compelling Evidence 3.0 block $29.00 per Mastercard resolution See pricing details Money management Enhance your platform by embedding financial services – set up financial accounts, issue cards, and offer financing. Connect Embedded payments for platforms and marketplaces. Start now Launch faster with Stripe-hosted or pre-built embedded components. Save time by using tooling from Stripe for onboarding, risk, tax forms and more. Grow revenue by monetising payments. Stripe handles pricing for your users Stripe sets and collects processing fees from your users, so you don’t have to. Learn more about how to qualify for a revenue share from Stripe. Included with Payments Included at no additional charge for businesses on standard payments pricing 0.25% starting fee for platforms that deploy their own payments pricing to earn revenue on each transaction. See pricing details Revenue and finance automation Streamline critical business processes with modular billing, tax, revenue reporting, and data analysis tools that work seamlessly together. Billing Subscription management software for recurring, usage-based, and one-time billing. Start now Respond to user demand faster with flexible pricing models. Increase revenue and reduce churn with Smart Retries and recovery workflow automations. Save engineering time with no-code tools or our composable APIs. Access to Billing Start billing for recurring subscriptions & usage based billing. 0.7% of Billing volume Includes Billing transactions processed on and off Stripe. Excludes one-off invoices. See pricing details Invoicing Global invoicing software. Start now Create, customise, and send an invoice in minutes – no code required. Save time with automated accounts receivable and invoicing workflows. Configure invoices for any use case. Starter Invoicing features to get started quickly. 0.4% per paid invoice See pricing details Tax Automated tax calculation and collection. Start now Get started in minutes with no-code and low-code setups. Stay automatically up to date with global tax rules and rates. Increase finance team efficiency by easily filing and remitting taxes. Turn Tax on from your Dashboard or with a single line of code Tax is built into a number of Stripe products, including Billing, Invoicing, Checkout, and Payment Links. 0.5% per transaction, where you’re registered to collect taxes Integrate Tax with custom checkout or payment flows Stripe Tax works with Stripe Payments APIs and can calculate and report tax on any payment processor. $0.70 per transaction, where you’re registered to collect taxes Includes 10 calculation API calls per transaction. S$0.07 per additional calculation API call above 10. See pricing details Stripe Sigma An interactive SQL environment for analysing your Stripe data and creating custom reports. Start now Get faster, more comprehensive insights using SQL or AI-powered natural language prompts. Make confident, data-driven decisions with fully customisable reporting. Keep teams in sync and save time with scheduled reports. Access to Stripe Sigma Start exploring your business data. Try for free for 30 days Starting at $15.00 per month, infrastructure fee Plus a fee per charge starting at + $0.03 See pricing details Data Pipeline Send Stripe data and reports directly to your data warehouse or cloud storage. Start now Set up your pipeline in minutes and automate data delivery – no code required. Speed up your financial close and access more complete business insights. Offload ongoing maintenance with a pipeline that's built into Stripe. Access to Data Pipeline Centralise your Stripe data with other business data. Try for free for 30 days $0.03 per transaction See pricing details Revenue Recognition Automated revenue reporting to streamline accrual accounting. Start now Close books quickly and accurately with automated accounting reports and dashboards. Easily review finances and audit in real time. Stay compliant with ASC 606 and IFRS 15. Access to Revenue Recognition Simplify accrual accounting. Try for free for 30 days 0.25% of volume See pricing details More Atlas Software to quickly incorporate your startup. Start now File your incorporation paperwork in minutes. Use documents trusted by law firms, tax attorneys, and venture capital investors. Get over $50K in discounts and perks. Incorporate your company Incorporate your company, get your EIN, issue equity, and file your 83(b) tax election. US$500.00 one-off setup fee (includes government fees and your first year of registered agent services) See pricing details Custom pricing Join leading enterprises on Stripe Create tailored solutions to help you expand into new markets, optimise payments performance, automate revenue and finance workflows, monetise financial services, and more. Contact sales Build your custom package Work with our sales team to design a solution that meets your needs: Payments Radar Connect Invoicing Billing and more Get the support you need Technical account management Professional Services Certified implementation partners Flexible structures IC+ pricing, discounted flat rates, subscriptions, and buy-rates for platforms. Volume-based discounts Discounts based on volume tiers, commitments, and product usage. Global single rates Optional aggregated pricing for all markets, allowing you to go global with ease. Cost transparency Dashboards, tools, and APIs that give you transparency into your costs.
